problem_statement: Flight search sorting is inverted/misapplied: requests with sort_by=price return results ordered by departure time, and the default ordering appears swapped to price instead of departure time.
goal: Fix GET /flights/search sorting so sort_by=price orders flights from cheapest to most expensive, while the default sort orders by departure time.
acceptance_criteria: GET /flights/search?sort_by=price returns flights sorted ascending by price.
GET /flights/search without sort_by returns flights sorted by departure time.
The implementation matches the intended sort mapping in the flight search service and any route-level parameter handling.
Existing flight search behavior other than sort order remains unchanged.
constraints: Issue explicitly points to backend/app/services/flight_service.py search_flights as the affected file.
Keep the fix localized to the backend search/sort logic unless tests reveal a route parameter mapping bug.
unknowns: Whether the bug is in sort-key mapping inside search_flights or in the route/controller translating sort_by into service arguments.
Whether tests currently cover both default ordering and sort_by=price ordering.
repo_summary: Backend-focused repository with flight search API and service layer; relevant likely files include backend/app/api/routes/flights.py, backend/app/services/flight_service.py, backend/app/models/flight.py, backend/app/schemas/flight.py, and backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py.

targeted_symbols.reason: Explicitly named in the issue as the affected implementation area; likely contains the sort-by mapping or default ordering logic.
May translate query parameters into service arguments; needed if the bug is due to inverted parameter wiring rather than service sorting.
Likely place to confirm/lock the expected default and price sort behavior after the fix.

localization_rationale: The issue directly names backend/app/services/flight_service.py search_flights as the affected file, making it the smallest likely implementation area.
The symptom indicates a sort-key inversion or wrong default branch in the service layer, with the API route as a secondary check if query parameters are mapped incorrectly.
Tests in backend/app/tests/test_flight_service.py are the most relevant nearby verification area for reproducing and preventing regression.
